business_ideas.idea: Missouri Star Quilt Company - largest quilting company with $100M+ revenue
Quilters Daily Deal - daily deal site for fabric and quilting supplies
Sleep and Sew - slumber party experience for women to quilt together
Multiple quilting towns as tourist destinations with local businesses
YouTube tutorials and education content for quilting
Online forum for quilters with 90K members
Pretzel - photo roll meets credit card statement tracking app
Small lemonade stand businesses - barbecue restaurant

predictions.text: Missouri Star will reach $1 billion valuation via 5x revenue multiple in 2 years
